nodes.name: fingerprints.json
nodes.summary: Stores structural fingerprints of files to enable efficient incremental updates by detecting meaningful code changes.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON format containing file hashes and structural metadata.

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: The comprehensive knowledge graph for the project, containing all discovered nodes, edges, layers, and tour steps.
nodes.languageNotes: Large JSON file acting as the primary data source for the architectural dashboard.

nodes.name: meta.json
nodes.summary: Analysis metadata including timestamps, git commit hash, and analyzed file count.
nodes.languageNotes: Small JSON file for tracking analysis state.

nodes.name: ua-import-map-input.json
nodes.summary: Temporary input file for calculating file import relationships during the analysis phase.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON format containing raw import statements found in source files.

nodes.name: ua-import-map-output.json
nodes.summary: Temporary output file containing resolved import paths between files.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON format mapping source files to their dependencies.

nodes.name: ua-scan-files.json
nodes.summary: Temporary list of all files discovered during the initial recursive scan of the project.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array of file paths relative to project root.

edges.summary: SyncCoordinator uses SyncLogger for event tracing and error reporting.
SyncRuntime schedules and executes periodic sync runs via SyncCoordinator.

layers.name: Domain Contracts
layers.description: Core entity models, types, and abstract port interfaces defining storage contracts.

layers.name: Sync Runtime
layers.description: Core synchronization logic, sync coordinator, runtime executor, and offline outbox patterns.

layers.name: Configuration & Logging
layers.description: Logging helpers, YAML config managers, and cross-cutting utility tools.

layers.name: Drift Local Adapter
layers.description: Drift database schema definitions, code-generated files, and local persistence adapter implementations.

layers.name: Firebase Remote Adapter
layers.description: Firebase Realtime Database and Firestore remote storage gateway implementations.

layers.name: Preferences Local Adapter
layers.description: Local preferences persistence layer using SharedPreferences or custom key-value stores.

layers.name: Supabase Remote Adapter
layers.description: Supabase integration layer, database schema mappings, and remote connection gateways.

layers.name: Assets Local Adapter
layers.description: Assets mapping, JSON parsing, and local asset-based data source repositories.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit tests, mock gateways, and integration test suites validating all storage adapters.

layers.name: Project Support
layers.description: Build scripts, dependency configurations, gitnexus rules, and project documentation.

tour.title: Domain Contracts
tour.description: Introduces core domain models and ports decoupling sync engines from concrete database backends.

tour.title: Synchronization Engine
tour.description: Orchestrates transaction queue execution, coordinator routines, and offline outbox patterns.

tour.title: Drift SQLite Persistence
tour.description: Implements local-first relational database schema and queries using the Drift package.

tour.title: Firebase Remote Sync
tour.description: Binds remote Cloud Firestore and Realtime Database gateways with sync executors.

tour.title: Key-Value Preferences & Supabase Adapter
tour.description: Leverages local Shared Preferences for session data and Supabase gateways for remote sync routes.
